hero.title: Bitcoin
hero.subtitle: Global Settlement Layer
hero.description: Decentralized infrastructure for transferring value. Open, permissionless, always running—like email, but for money.

layer1.name: Base Layer
layer1.desc: Settlement & finality. Immutable ledger secured by proof-of-work.

layer2.name: Lightning Network
layer2.desc: Instant payments at scale. Millions of txs/sec off-chain.

layer3.name: Application Layer
layer3.desc: Wallets, services, and protocols built on top.

markets.title: Network Metrics
markets.subtitle: Market data is secondary to network utility

chat.title: Talk to Bitcoin Agent
chat.subtitle: Ask anything: what Bitcoin is, how to buy it, why it matters. I explain everything in plain language. What can I help you with?
chat.placeholder: Ask anything: What is Bitcoin? How do I buy?
chat.welcome:
Hi! I'm your guide to learning Bitcoin from scratch. You don't need any prior knowledge. You can ask me things like:

• What is Bitcoin and why does it matter?
• How does it protect me from inflation?
• What is a "seed phrase" and why is it so important?
• How do I send money to my family cheaper than Western Union?
• How do I buy Bitcoin in Mexico?

Pick one or type your own question.
chat.error: Failed to get response. Please try again.
suggestedQuestions: What is Bitcoin in simple words?
Why Bitcoin for someone in Mexico?
How do I buy Bitcoin with my bank?
How does it protect me from inflation?

tip.title: Leave a tip
tip.description: Your tip is voluntary. Sats you send help keep this project running—servers, APIs, and improvements. Thanks for your support!
tip.thankYou: Thank you for keeping the orange flame alive!
